buckets.label: Aquatic Life
buckets.description: Fish, crustaceans, turtles, marine mammals, sea legends, and other aquatic animals.

buckets.label: Aquatic Habitats
buckets.description: Aquariums, plants, coral, shells, seascape features, and other aquatic environment elements.

buckets.label: Nautical Items
buckets.description: Boats, navigation gear, safety objects, and other sea-adjacent items.

buckets.label: Maker Workshop
buckets.description: Fabrication, electronics, welding, sewing, and mixed maker-space equipment.

buckets.label: Workshop Tools
buckets.description: Garage, woodshop, and handheld or powered workshop tools and fixtures.

items.label: Bowfront Tank
items.description: A curved-front aquarium with black trim, blue water, bubbles, plants, gravel, decorations, and small fish.

items.label: Nano Cube Tank
items.description: A compact cube-style nano aquarium with a light, plants, dark substrate, stones, and small red aquatic animals.

items.label: Rimless Planted Tank
items.description: A rimless aquascaped planted aquarium with a slim light, carpeting plants, rocks, and mixed green and red plants.

items.label: Standard Aquarium Tank

items.label: Turtle Tank
